prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第58名（2 026年），近年排名稳定在50–60名区间；2025–2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（副院长婚内出轨被免职、误挂旭日旗事件等），可能对报 考热度产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度排名第69位，评价一般；教育学A、马克思主义理论A、地理学A、中国语言文学A-、外国语言文学A-，共5个A-及以上学科， 师范类学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程、计算机类等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业（人工智能、自动化、光电信息、计算机 等）高度契合；本省2026年考生总数约474900人，较2025年基本持平；南京师范大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角核心城市，地 域吸引力强；该校在江西省招生规模适中（物理类48人），跨省报考热度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划缩招约12.7%（位次数字减小）、声誉 明显负面（位次数字增大）以及专业热度偏高等因素，缩招与声誉负面效应相互对冲，但声誉负面影响略占主导；预测2026年最低位次约21228名，区间20728–21728名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics/Science category was approximately 9232 → 10185 → 11494 → 15818 → 22767, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12500 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 22767; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans were 39 → 42 → 42 → 46 → 55, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 48, a reduction of about 12.7% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 58th (2026), stable in the 50-60 range in recent years; 2025-2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (deputy dean dismissed for extramarital affair during marriage, mistakenly hanging Rising Sun flag, etc.), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranking 69th, with average evaluation; Education A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, a total of 5 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding strength in normal subjects.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, etc., are highly recommended in social heat, highly consistent with the school's Physics Category enrollment majors (Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Optoelectronic Information, Computer, etc.); the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 474,900, basically unchanged from 2025; Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal; the school has a moderate enrollment scale in Jiangxi Province (48 in Physics Category), with high cross-provincial application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 plan reduction of about 12.7% (ranking number decreases), clearly negative reputation (ranking number increases), and high major popularity, the reduction and negative reputation effects offset each other, but the negative reputation effect slightly dominates; predict the 2026 minimum ranking to be about 21228, with a range of 20728-21728.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 58th on the Soft Science main list (2026), stable in the 50–60 range in recent years; reputation evaluation for 2025–2026 is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (deputy dean dismissed for extramarital affair during marriage, mistaken display of the Rising Sun Flag incident, etc.), which may suppress application enthusiasm to some extent; Douyin popularity ranking 69th, with average reviews; Education A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, highly relevant to history category majors (Accounting, Financial Management, English Teacher Training, Classical Philology, Philosophy, etc.).

预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 plan by about 63.6% (ranking numbers notably increase), clearly negative reputation (ranking numbers increase), and divergence in major popularity, the expansion effect dominates, with negative reputation further reinforcing the backward direction of rankings; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 2781st place, with a range of 2281–3281.
